name: mahagenco-centralized-monitoring
description: Enterprise-grade centralized monitoring system for MAHAGENCO thermal power generation
author: MAHAGENCO Dashboard Team

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace frontend && npm install --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.test: npm test --workspace frontend && npm test --workspace backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace frontend && npm run test:coverage --workspace backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace frontend && npm run lint:fix --workspace backend
scripts.db:reset: npm run migrate:rollback --workspace backend && npm run migrate --workspace backend && npm run seed --workspace backend
scripts.security:audit: npm audit --workspace frontend && npm audit --workspace backend
